mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id, summary_preview, facts_count, memory_world_name, entry_count, enabled_entry_count, last_source_message_id, last_refreshed_message_count, last_synced_at, sync_status, sync_error, updated_at FROM app_conversation_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_conversation_memory (conversation_id, summary_preview, facts_count, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, NULL, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO app_conversation_memory (conversation_id, summary_preview, facts_count, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{summaryPreview}, #{factsCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE summary_preview = VALUES(summary_preview), facts_count = VALUES(facts_count), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO app_conversation_memory ( conversation_id, summary_preview, facts_count, memory_world_name, entry_count, enabled_entry_count, last_source_message_id, last_refreshed_message_count, sync_status, sync_error, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{conversationId}, #{summaryPreview}, #{factsCount}, #{memoryWorldName}, #{entryCount}, #{enabledEntryCount}, #{lastSourceMessageId}, #{lastRefreshedMessageCount}, #{syncStatus}, #{syncError}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE summary_preview = VALUES(summary_preview), facts_count = VALUES(facts_count), memory_world_name = VALUES(memory_world_name), entry_count = VALUES(entry_count), enabled_entry_count = VALUES(enabled_entry_count), last_source_message_id = VALUES(last_source_message_id), last_refreshed_message_count = VALUES(last_refreshed_message_count), sync_status = VALUES(sync_status), sync_error = VALUES(sync_error), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_conversation_memory SET memory_world_name = #{memoryWorldName}, entry_count = #{entryCount}, enabled_entry_count = #{enabledEntryCount}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, sync_error = #{syncError}, last_synced_at = CASE WHEN #{syncStatus} = 'SUCCESS' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE last_synced_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
